description: A themed content block that wraps arbitrary CMS-driven content with optional colour variants (grey, dark, highlight) and an optional inner content wrapper.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Plain uosblock with no colour variant, containing a heading and paragraph

props.children:
What are the UN sustainable development goals?

The global population is growing, placing increasing demand on the world's finite resources and exacerbating the climate crisis.

stories.name: Grey
stories.description: Grey themed content block with a list of navigation links

stories.name: Dark
stories.description: Dark themed content block with a heading and body text

props.children:
Research strategy

New molecules have been detected and studied using microwave and photoelectron spectroscopy techniques.

stories.name: Highlight
stories.description: Highlighted content block with a heading and list

props.children:
Main contributions

  • The development of new fields of chemistry
  • The discovery of C60 Buckminsterfullerene
  • Isolation and characterisation of C60 and C70

notes: Two inner content patterns observed: (1) a direct .uosblock-content div wrapping raw CMS content (older pattern), and (2) multiple .block.block-layout-builder children (newer layout-builder pattern). Both are CMS-driven and should be treated as slot content via children. The variant prop maps to a modifier class on the root div: no class for default, 'grey', 'dark', or 'highlight'. The textbox class also appears on the root but seems to be a layout variant added by the CMS; it is not modelled as a prop here since its role is unclear from the samples.
